title: Iran Hangs 3, Including Teen Accused Of Killing Cops During January Protests
summary_full: Mehdi Ghasemi, Saleh Mohammadi and Saeed Davoudi were hanged in the city of Qom south of Tehran.
summary_public: Mehdi Ghasemi, Saleh Mohammadi and Saeed Davoudi were hanged in the city of Qom south of Tehran.
